steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage uses “significant” to describe Juarez's accomplishments, and the colon signals that these accomplishments explain what kind of figure he became.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
”Important” perfectly fits the signal — his significant accomplishments made him one of the most important historical figures in Mexico.

The other three choices either contradict the passage's emphasis on his consequential legacy or lack textual support.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
